vocab.example: After a few heavy rain showers, the sunflowers I planted began to shoot up, eventually towering over me.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi, kiểm tra tình trạng
vocab.example: Every morning before school, I would run to the garden to check on my tomato plants to see if any fruit had ripened.
I spent hours tending to my small herb garden, making sure each plant got exactly the right amount of sunlight.

vocab.meaning: tỉa bớt (cành, lá) để cây gọn gàng hoặc phát triển tốt hơn
vocab.example: My grandfather showed me how to prune back the rose bushes so they would bloom more vibrantly in the spring.
If I forgot to water my succulents during the summer heat, the leaves would start to shrivel up.
The small apple sapling we planted in the backyard slowly started to branch out after its first year.
I used to carefully pick off the dead leaves to keep the basil plants looking healthy and green.

vocab.meaning: bắt rễ, cắm rễ vào đất
vocab.example: It took a few weeks for the cuttings to finally put down roots in the fresh soil I had prepared.
It was fascinating to watch how a tiny black seed could eventually turn into a massive pumpkin.

vocab.meaning: hỗ trợ, giúp sức cho quá trình phát triển
vocab.example: We used a bit of natural compost to help the young seedlings along during the early stages of their growth.
